mapper.select:
/* oms-po-poCnfrm-sql-oracle.xml - selectPoPlanReqSendList */ SELECT #{reqorderno} AS REQORDERNO , OWKEY , CTKEY , CTKEY AS REQCTKEY -- 09 , REQCTKEY AS GICTKEY -- 나머지 , REQORDERDAY , REQORDERTYPE , URGENCYREQORDERYN , ICKEY , SEQ , CASE WHEN DLVYREQORDERUNIT = 'INN' THEN 'PKG' ELSE DLVYREQORDERUNIT END AS DLVYREQORDERUNIT , REQORDERQTY , ICTGT , REQORDERAR , REQORDERQTY , REQORDERSTATUS , CASE WHEN NULLIF(#{ibexpctday}, '') IS NULL THEN IBEXPCTDAY ELSE #{ibexpctday} END AS IBEXPCTDAY FROM TORDER_INFO_REQORDER WHERE 1 = 1 AND REQORDERDAY = #{reqorderday} AND REQCTKEY = #{reqctkey} AND REQORDERTYPE = #{reqordertype} AND URGENCYREQORDERYN = #{urgencyreqorderyn} AND REQORDERSTATUS = #{reqorderstatus} AND CASE DLVYREQORDERUNIT WHEN 'PLT' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END = #{pltyn}
AND REQORDERNO = #{reqorderno}

SELECT (AVQTY + IBEXPCTQTY) - (B2BCTGRTDAYS * AVGOBQTY) AS CTQTY FROM ( SELECT-- B2B 센터 입고 예정정보 ( B2B 입고예정정보 체크 유무에 따른 값 설정) B2B_REQORDER.AVQTY , CASE WHEN B2B_REQORDER.IBEXPCTDAY >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') THEN B2B_REQORDER.IBEXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END AS IBEXPCTQTY , GRTDAYS.B2BCTGRTDAYS , B2B_REQORDER.AVGOBQTY FROM TORDER_MST_IC I INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ICXCT IC ON I.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND I.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY AND IC.CTKEY = #{ctkey} INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_B2BAVGOBQTY_REQORDER B2B_REQORDER ON IC.ICKEY = B2B_REQORDER.ICKEY AND B2B_REQORDER.CTKEY = #{reqctkey} AND B2B_REQORDER.CRITDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_B2BGRTDAYS GRTDAYS ON IC.OWKEY = GRTDAYS.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = GRTDAYS.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = GRTDAYS.ICKEY AND B2B_REQORDER.CTKEY = GRTDAYS.B2BCTKEY WHERE I.ICKEY = #{ickey} ) F

/* oms-po-poCnfrm-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderNisSoList */ SELECT H.OWKEY, H.SOHDKEY, D.SODTKEY, D.ICKEY, D.URGENCYREQYN FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD H INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT D ON H.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND H.SOHDKEY = D.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE O ON H.OWKEY = O.OWKEY AND H.ORDERTYPECD = O.ORDERTYPECD WHERE O.OBYN = 'Y' AND D.URGENCYREQYN = 'Y' AND D.URGENCYREQPRCSSEQ IS NULL AND H.DLVYEXPCTDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd')
